heading: Retrieve All Online Archives for a Cluster Using the API
body:
To retrieve all the online archives configured for a cluster using
the API (Application Programming Interface), send a `GET` request to the [onlineArchives](api/doc/atlas-admin-api-v2/group/endpoint-online-archive) endpoint for the cluster. To learn more about
the syntax and options, see [API](api/doc/atlas-admin-api-v2/operation/operation-listgroupclusteronlinearchives).
